name: Composition example
description: A short canon built from a single motif. The motif is presented plainly, then repeated later as a transposed answer and a reversed answer so the relationship stays easy to hear.

phrases.comment: Subject statement: the motif is heard in its plain form with no transforms.
Answer entry: the same motif is transposed up a fifth and delayed with silence at the start so it enters later like a simple canon.
Reverse entry: the motif enters later again, but this time in reverse order so the imitation is easy to compare against the earlier voices.
